pages.raw_text:
With 1000 delegates registered at
noon today, representing 20 states
and II countries, the Fifth Dry
Farming congress is ready for the
opening session tonight.


When President Taft presses the
electric button at s p. m. 1t will be a
notice to the world that the great
work of the congress has begun.


At noon today II. w. Newton,
chairman of the board of control of
the Dry Farming congress, said that
the preparations for the formal
opening tonight are complete and
that he present congress will be the
largest in poitn of number of dele
gates and the largest in the point OF
exposition of products of dry farm
ing that has been held since the
movement started.
